problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression — specifically mRNA therapy to — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
